name: Almond Butter Loaves
recipeInstructions:
For best results, use a golden-butter recipe cake mix.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease and flour two 9x5-inch loaf pans.
CRUST: Combine brown sugar and butter in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed until light and fluffy. Stir in toasted almonds and flour. Blend well. Divide and press evenly into pans.
CAKE: In a large bowl, combine cake mix, eggs, water, and butter. Beat at medium speed for 4 minutes. Pour batter into pans. Bake for 35-45 minutes or until tested done. Cool in pans for 10 minutes. Invert onto cooling racks, crust side up. Cool completely.
GLAZE: Combine powdered sugar, water, and almond extract in a small bowl. Stir until smooth. Add water 1 tablespoon at a time until glaze reaches desired consistency. Spoon over cooled loaves. Sprinkle sliced almonds on top.
Toasted Almonds:
To toast almonds, spread in a single layer on a baking sheet. Bake at 325°F for 6-8 minutes or until fragrant and light golden brown. Cool before chopping.
